commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6e2dbb68a065b4c01d8934185d1cd0253e220bca)
commands.review_summary:
Adds `agents.defaults.imageQuality`, documents it, and threads model/fallback-aware image compression grids through image-tool media loading with tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows image execution resolves `modelOverride` with the alias-aware fallback resolver while the new compression policy does not. The original PR is a feature, so there is no separate bug reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for alias-aware compression and real behavior proof; no repair lane marker because proof must come from a real setup.

target.title: Adapt image compression quality by model
target.body:
## Summary

- add `agents.defaults.imageQuality` with `auto`, `efficient`, `balanced`, and `high` modes
- make image-tool media loading choose an adaptive compression grid from the selected image model, image count, and fallback candidates
- document the new setting and cover provider/model-aware grids, model overrides, and fallback-safe caps

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/media/web-media.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts` (4 files, 205 passed)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean: no accepted/actionable findings)
- `pnpm check:changed` on Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksamgparkanfys6v84179zt8`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Image-tool compression now adapts to the configured image quality preference and selected vision model while capping to the safest candidate when model fallbacks are possible.
Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest plus Blacksmith Testbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/media/web-media.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-tool.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts`; `pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed 205 tests; Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksamgparkanfys6v84179zt8` exited 0.
Observed result after fix: Model-aware grids select larger caps for documented high-capability models, many-image auto mode switches efficient, and fallbacks/overrides cap compression to the smaller candidate before image loading.
What was not tested: Live provider calls with real image uploads were not run; this patch validates local compression policy and the affected type/lint/test lanes.
target.author: steipete
